creator: neil@darlow.co.uk
text:
Update of squirrelmail-vlogin-plugin from 3.9.0 to 3.9.1 for enhancement/bug fixes.
The PORTNAME has been modified and a PKGNAMESUFFIX introduced - as per miwi's preference.

--- squirrelmail-vlogin-plugin.orig/Makefile    Wed Nov 22 06:56:51 2006
+++ squirrelmail-vlogin-plugin/Makefile Mon Jan 22 21:08:03 2007
@@ -4,10 +4,11 @@
 #
 # $FreeBSD: ports/mail/squirrelmail-vlogin-plugin/Makefile,v 1.8 2006/11/21 19:43:22 miwi Exp $
 
-PORTNAME=              squirrelmail-${SQUIRREL_PLUGIN_NAME}-plugin
-PORTVERSION=           3.9.0
+PORTNAME=              squirrelmail
+PORTVERSION=           3.9.1
 CATEGORIES=            mail www
 MASTER_SITES=          http://www.squirrelmail.org/plugins/
+PKGNAMESUFFIX=         -${SQUIRREL_PLUGIN_NAME}-plugin
 DISTNAME=              ${SQUIRREL_PLUGIN_NAME}-${PORTVERSION}-1.2.7
 DIST_SUBDIR=           squirrelmail
 
diff -ur squirrelmail-vlogin-plugin.orig/distinfo squirrelmail-vlogin-plugin/distinfo
--- squirrelmail-vlogin-plugin.orig/distinfo    Wed Nov 22 06:56:51 2006
+++ squirrelmail-vlogin-plugin/distinfo Mon Jan 22 21:08:16 2007
@@ -1,3 +1,3 @@
-MD5 (squirrelmail/vlogin-3.9.0-1.2.7.tar.gz) = b446cd102915e443c1174ffce426e35c
-SHA256 (squirrelmail/vlogin-3.9.0-1.2.7.tar.gz) = 6b2353bbbf641eab90e565e7c5ec085d17464e3ba7514b20efd4804ef33ebb59
-SIZE (squirrelmail/vlogin-3.9.0-1.2.7.tar.gz) = 54370
+MD5 (squirrelmail/vlogin-3.9.1-1.2.7.tar.gz) = 3d3f7981c1d372c6a0aa6951be78e61c
+SHA256 (squirrelmail/vlogin-3.9.1-1.2.7.tar.gz) = 41ac7ac5e3c9010e639ab6a3345de2ee8638f24fe325aea2792a9be2d4f3f601
+SIZE (squirrelmail/vlogin-3.9.1-1.2.7.tar.gz) = 55077

Fix: 

N/A
How-To-Repeat: N/A
